scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev --workspace apps/web" "npm run dev --workspace services/auth-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/patient-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/doctor-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/availability-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/appointment-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/medical-records-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/notification-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/realtime-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/audit-service"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -k "npm run dev --workspace services/auth-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/patient-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/doctor-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/availability-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/appointment-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/medical-records-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/notification-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/realtime-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/audit-service"
